title: The Big Bonanza
writer: Dorrell McGowan, Stuart E. McGowan, Paul Gangelin
actors: Richard Arlen, Robert Livingston, Jane Frazee
plot: Captain Jed Kelton (Richard Arlen), Union Army officer, unfairly tried for cowardice in battle during the Civil War, escapes from custody while being transported to Fort Leavenport in Kansas. After a brief visit home, Jed and his ...
